metadata.file_name: Dexys Midnight Runners, Kevin Rowland - Come On Eileen (Single Edit).flac
metadata.title: Come On Eileen (Single Edit)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:26.87] Come on, Eileen
[00:35.65] Come on, Eileen
[00:41.02] Poor old Johnnie Ray
[00:45.20] Sounded sad upon the radio
[00:47.05] Moved a million hearts in mono
[00:49.81] Our mothers cried
[00:54.27] Sang along, who'd blame them?
[00:58.91] You're grown (you're grown up)
[01:01.16] So grown (so grown up)
[01:03.28] Now I must say more than ever
[01:06.29] (Come on, Eileen)
[01:07.68] Toora, loora, toora, loo-rye-aye
[01:14.31] And we can sing just like our fathers
[01:20.24] Come on, Eileen, oh, I swear well he means
[01:23.72] At this moment, you mean everything
[01:28.42] You in that dress, my thoughts I confess
[01:32.19] Verge on dirty, oh, come on, Eileen
[01:45.70] Come on, Eileen
[01:51.06] These people 'round here
[01:54.75] Were beaten down, eyes sunk in smoke-dried face
[01:57.05] They're resigned to what their fate is
[01:59.55] But not us (no, never)
[02:01.38] No, not us (no, never)
[02:03.82] We are far too young and clever
[02:07.42] (Remember)
[02:08.53] Toora, loora, toora, loo-rye-aye
[02:14.79] Eileen, I'll hum this tune forever
[02:20.63] Come on, Eileen, oh, I swear well he means
[02:24.11] Ah, come on, let's take off everything
[02:28.82] That pretty red dress, Eileen, tell him yes
[02:32.54] Ah, come on, let's, ah, come on, Eileen
[02:37.58] That pretty red dress, Eileen, tell him yes
[02:41.08] Ah, come on, let's, ah, come on, Eileen, please
[02:48.76] Come on, Eileen, ta-loo-rye-aye
[02:52.99] Come on, Eileen, ta-loo-rye-aye
[02:57.33] Now you have grown, and now you have shown
[03:01.58] Oh, Eileen
[03:04.76] Said
[03:05.46] Come on, Eileen, ta-loo-rye-aye
[03:08.74] Come on, Eileen, ta-loo-rye-aye
[03:12.05] Now I must say more than ever
[03:15.64] Things 'round here change
[03:17.41] I said, toora loora, ta-loo-rye-aye, ta-loo-rye-aye
[03:26.96] Come on, Eileen, oh, I swear well he means
[03:30.17] At this moment, you mean everything
[03:34.51] You in that dress, my thoughts I confess
[03:37.89] Verge on dirty, ah, come on, Eileen
[03:42.66] Come on, Eileen, oh, I swear well he means
[03:45.92] At this moment, you mean everything
[03:50.23] In that dress, oh, my thoughts, I confess
[03:53.51] Well, they're dirty, come on, Eileen
[03:57.97] Come on, Eileen, well he means
[04:01.20] Everything
[04:03.99] You in that dress, I confess
[04:05.59] Oh, believe me, if all those endearing young charms
[04:06.63] That I gaze on so fondly today
[04:07.93] Were to suddenly leave you or fly in the night
[04:08.88] Just like fairy gifts gone in the sky
[04:09.56]
